title: Villager Country House
description: This mod adds a Villager Country House to the savanna biome
body:
This mod adds a Villager Country House to the game, featuring various villagers living inside.


![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/901b1de457f4989a52269de71bfc7d2964c43ee3.jpeg)


It has a detailed interior with a large, well furnished kitchen, and there are hidden loot secrets waiting to be discovered inside.


![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cb0e4c73207a89903276d8d84689dc2912f30f9.jpeg)


![Kitchen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1e1183ce84f5d79b846de65772a5a4a93eb9a1c.jpeg)
 

The house generates naturally in Savanna biomes.

**Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks**
